g.text: Fix ReviewPoster comment tracking for feedback
Fix feedback poller reaction mapping and PR author detection
Fix persona reanalysis: minimum sample size and EMA history
Add diff-size multi-pass trigger and backward compat constant
Wire per-repo severity config into orchestrator
Fix severity verdict recomputation to match plan
Add missing database migration support for new feedback tables
Enter: create PR d: diff r: re-run f: follow up n: new task Esc: cancel
Ctrl+S to submit • f to focus
